DP.135.0000:
Hello.
I’m pleased to meet you.\f
I’m Maylene, and I’m the Gym
Leader.\f
I don’t really know what it means to
be strong, or how I got to be the\r
Gym Leader.\f
But I will do the best I can as the
Gym Leader.\f
I take battling very seriously.
Whenever you’re ready!\f
DP.135.0001:
...OK.
You win.\f
That was a tough loss.
I learned a lot from it.\f
Please, accept this Gym Badge.\f
DP.135.0002:
[0103,0000] received
the Cobble Badge from Maylene.
DP.135.0003:
Um...
I should explain about that Badge.\f
If you have that official Pokémon
League Badge, you can use the hidden\r
move Fly outside of battle.\f
Oh, and please take this as well.\f
DP.135.0004:
That [0108,0000] contains
the move [0106,0001].\f
Um... That move inflicts damage,
and it robs the target’s HP.
DP.135.0005:
Gee, I’m hungry...\f
Oh, sorry, it’s nothing.
I didn’t say anything.\f
[0103,0000], I can’t explain what
it means to be strong.\f
I don’t know how much effort goes
into being strong...\f
But being with Pokémon lets us
keep making the effort, doesn’t it?
DP.135.0006:
Hey, there!
How’s it going, Champ-to-be?\f
The Gym Leader is a user of
Fighting-type Pokémon.\f
She’d be a terror against Normal-type
Pokémon.\f
But! And it’s a big but!
Just between you and me...\f
Maylene, the Gym Leader, said Flying-
and Psychic-type Pokémon could be\r
real trouble for her!
DP.135.0007:
Oh! [0103,0000]!
You’ve beaten the Gym Leader!\f
Of course, I thought you’d win.
DP.135.0008:
Veilstone City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Maylene\f
Certified Trainers:
[0103,0001]
